top_signals.title: Andy Burnham plans beefed-up control centre in Downing Street
top_signals.summary: Incoming prime minister wants to be less reliant on ‘imperial’ Treasury as he bids to restore confidence in government
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Faith vs. therapy: Inside the Philippine school for exorcists
top_signals.summary: A key element of exorcists' training is discerning the difference between psychological and spiritual problems.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: U.N. to list more sites as ‘in danger’ from conflict or climate change
top_signals.summary: Among them are a biblical site, Lebanese castles, an antelope migration path and the world's deepest lake.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Activities of U.S. Affiliates of Foreign Multinational Enterprises, 2024
top_signals.summary: Majority-owned U.S. affiliates of foreign multinational enterprises employed 8.57 million workers in the United States in 2024, a 0.2 percent increase from 8.56 million workers in 2023, according to statistics on U.S. affiliate operations and finances released today by the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis.
